title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Gowanus, Brooklyn | $900–$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Gowanus, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Gowanus residents and business owners facing bat infestations need swift, humane solutions to protect their properties and health. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Gowanus, addressing the unique challenges posed by the neighborhood's mix of historic brownstones, industrial warehouses, and modern developments. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to safely remove bats and prevent future entry, ensuring your Brooklyn property remains bat-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Gowanus and greater Brooklyn with specialized bat control services that comply with all local wildlife protection regulations. Our team offers same-day emergency response, thorough attic inspections, complete exclusion work, and guaranteed results—all at transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Gowanus's unique blend of converted industrial buildings along the canal, traditional rowhouses, and newer residential construction creates numerous entry points for bats seeking roosting sites. The neighborhood's older warehouses and buildings with aged roofing, soffits, and ventilation systems are particularly vulnerable to bat colonization, making professional exclusion services essential for property owners.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Gowanus typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, entry points, and the complexity of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is it legal to remove bats in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bats are protected wildlife in New York, so removal must be done humanely using exclusion methods that allow bats to leave but not re-enter. We never use extermination methods and follow all NYC and state regulations, including seasonal restrictions during maternity periods from May through August.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Gowanus building?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, dark grease marks near entry points, accumulation of droppings (guano) in attics or near walls, strong ammonia-like odors, and sightings of bats entering or exiting your property at twilight. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: The exclusion process typically takes 1-3 days for installation of one-way exclusion devices and sealing entry points, followed by a 3-7 day monitoring period to ensure all bats have exited. Complete cleanup and sanitization of affected areas can add another 1-2 days, depending on the extent of contamination.
